Food Drug Administration (FDA) approved Tecentriq (atezolizumab) combination with Avastin (bevacizumab), carboplatin, paclitaxel, treatment combination known ABCP, first-line treatment patients with metastatic nonsquamous non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
This indication excludes patients with EGFR/ALK aberrations.
approval based findings from phase IMpower150 trial, which ABCP regimen reduced risk death percent compared with Avastin chemotherapy (BCP) patients with advanced wild-type NSCLC.
Results showed that median overall survival (OS) with addition Tecentriq 19.2 months compared with 14.7 months group.
Moreover, 24-month rate with Tecentriq percent compared with percent BCP.
Approximately percent trials participants were EGFR ALK-positive.
Prior study entry, these patients received least prior EGFR TKI.
When patients with EGFR/ALK alterations were included intent-to-treat population, median with ABCP jumped 19.8 months compared with 14.9 months BCP.
Better than expected survival also seen patients with liver metastases.
Added efficacy both groups correlated with addition VEGF inhibitor Avastin Tecentriq.
separate cohort study looking Tecentriq plus carboplatin paclitaxel (ACP) there less pronounced improvement compared with BCP.
group, objective response rate (ORR) percent with ABCP compared with percent with percent with BCP.
There percent reduction risk death with ABCP compared with patients with liver metastases percent reduction risk death patients with NSCLC.
risk death reduced percent percent patients with liver metastases EGFR/ALK alterations, respectively.

Home Scholar Women Issues Straightening Eyebrows: Permissible?
Dear scholars, as-salamu `alaykum.
know that plucking eyebrows haram.
However, eyebrows very thick unwieldy, light shaping straighten them out?
Jazakum Allah khayran.
Muslim Women Permitted Pluck Their Eyebrows?
Some jurists permit light shaping eyebrows they thick hairy that they harm appear wide thus displease husband.
word used Hadith nams Arabic, which means plucking eyebrows.
Prophet (peace blessings upon him) considered plucking distorting creation Allah.
However, scholars have studied issue detail have concluded that person's eyebrows unusually thick unwieldy, then straighten them out.
This considered nams plucking.
Allah wants look neat tidy, trying appear neat tidy distorting Allah's creation, rather only enhancing
known that plucking eyebrows forbidden.
However, some jurists permit light shaping eyebrows they thick hairy that they harm appear wide thus displease husband.
pleases husband that they shaped lightly, there nothing wrong doing this just please husband.
extreme shaping plucking, permitted.
Woman House Follow Imam Mosque?
